title: Hierologia: an open academic API for the comparative study of sacred traditions
description: Hierologia preserves theological, historical, and sociological knowledge across religious traditions as structured, neutral, well-sourced, and versioned data. This release covers two traditions, Islamic theology (kalam) and Christian theology: concepts, figures, and schools linked into a graph, each entry sourced and peer-reviewed, with cross-tradition links that compare comparable questions across traditions without equating their answers.
